comment: No lockfile present — the engine detects the import from source analysis and returns PACKAGE_REACHABLE for reachability. Version resolution is incomplete (version range cannot be confirmed against a lockfile-pinned version), but the engine's reachability verdict is still based on the import graph. This case documents engine behavior: reachability is source-based, version matching is lockfile-based. Coverage: incomplete-signal=missing-lockfile.

advisories.note: Engine correctly detects import from source even without lockfile. The incomplete.lockfile-missing signal surfaces to the host for version-range gating; reachability itself is unambiguously PACKAGE_REACHABLE from the import graph.
